steps.title: Use the probability formula
steps.content:
The probability of selecting a blue marble is:
$$\frac{\text{number of blue marbles}}{\text{total number of marbles}}$$

steps.title: Read the table
steps.content:
The table shows $10$ blue marbles and $40$ marbles total, so the probability is:
$$\frac{10}{40}$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice B uses the green marbles, and choice C uses red plus blue. The event asked for blue only, so use the blue count over the total.

steps.title: Answer
steps.content: $10/40$ matches choice D, so D is correct.
